# kaleido_platform_identity_provider (Resource)

An identity provider (OIDC client) provides OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect authentication for platform accounts. It can be configured with various OIDC endpoints and settings.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kaleido_platform_identity_provider" "example" {
  name = "example"
  
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `client_id` (String) OAuth client identifier
- `client_type` (String) The OAuth client type: 'public' or 'confidential'
- `hostname` (String) Hostname used to generate the redirect URL
- `name` (String) The name of the identity provider

### Optional

- `ca_certificate` (String) Custom CA certificate for IDP requests
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OAuth client secret (required for confidential clients)
- `confidential_pkce_enabled` (Boolean) Enable PKCE for confidential clients (security best practice)
- `id_token_nonce_enabled` (Boolean) Enable nonce parameter and claim validation for ID tokens
- `issuer` (String) Valid issuer for this identity provider (required if oidc_config_url not provided)
- `jwks` (String) In-line JWKS object (required if oidc_config_url and jwks_url not provided)
- `jwks_url` (String) URL endpoint to download the JWKS package from
- `login_url` (String) Authorization endpoint for OAuth server (required if oidc_config_url not provided)
- `logout_url` (String) End session endpoint for OAuth server logout
- `oidc_config_url` (String) OpenID Connect provider configuration URL (often .well-known/openid-configuration)
- `scopes` (String) Scopes to include in IDP requests (must include 'openid email profile')
- `token_url` (String) Token endpoint for OAuth server (required if oidc_config_url not provided)
- `user_info_url` (String) URL endpoint to query user information using an access token

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
